AdminSettings.title: Admin Settings
AdminSettings.description: Global administrator configurations like access password

Day.title: Marathon Day
Day.description: Represents a single day of the marathon with chapter verses, state, and questions

id.description: The index/number of the marathon day

chapter.description: The name or reference of the bible chapter

verses.description: A list of reference verses for the day

questions.description: Three questions with choices and answer indices

isOpen.description: True if users can submit answers for this day

Subscriber.title: Marathon Subscriber
Subscriber.description: A participant in the scripture reading marathon

solvedDays.description: Mapping from dayId string to their answers, score, and timestamps

/subscribers/{subscriberId}.description: Subscribed users records and answer tracking sheet
